_note: Copiez ce fichier en config.json et renseignez vos valeurs en base64. Ne commitez jamais config.json.
_comment_VERIFY_TLS: Optional. Set false for intranet deployments using a self-signed certificate or a private CA chain not trusted by the Python certifi bundle. Common case for on-prem GLPI behind an internal CA. Plain bool, not base64.
